---
title: "The Unlikely Pioneer Behind mRNA Vaccines"
description: "Today's Daily podcast: Dr. Katalin Karikó's foresight and persistence for science."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-06-10"
categories: [biomedical, science, podcasting, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Katalin Karikó — mRNA pioneer. Image from [The New York Times](https://www.nytimes.com/2021/06/10/podcasts/the-daily/mrna-vaccines-katalin-kariko.html).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Today's Daily podcast: the remarkable story of Dr. Katalin Karikó and her foresight and persistence for science.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_the-unlikely-pioneer-behind-mrna-vaccines-activity-6808939736783319040-7UJd).*
